narrative:
Precinct Toledo 12H (precinct in Lucas County) has 851 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.9 percentage points.
